title: These are the 2026 Golden Globe Winners
text: NPR and Houston Public Media reported on the 2026 Golden Globe winners following the January 11 ceremony. The comprehensive list of winners included Paul Thomas Anderson for Best Director – Motion Picture for his film 'One Battle After Another.' The reporting provided context about the ceremony and the significance of various winners. NPR's coverage represents mainstream news coverage of the awards event, documenting the outcomes for a broad audience of entertainment and general news readers.
